case_title: PRITHVI NOBUTH VS. HAYES VALLEY NEIGHBORHOOD ASSOCIATION ET AL

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,164.00 FILED BY NOBUTH, PRITHVI AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES VALLEY NEIGHBORHOOD ASSOCIATION INTERSECTION FOR THE ARTS HAIGHT STREET ART CENTER HAYES VALLEY ART WORK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (16 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF NOBUTH, PRITHVI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF PRITHVA NOBUTH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAYES VALLEY NEIHBORHOOD ASSOCIATION REPRESENTED BY GAIL BAUGH, PRESIDENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAYES VALLEY ART WORKS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY EARL SPEAS, SITE MANAGER. DEFENDANT HAIGHT STREET ART CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PETER MCQUAID EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT INTERSECTION FOR THE ARTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RANDY ROLLISON EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOBUTH, PRITHVI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAYES VALLEY NEIGHBORHOOD ASSOCIATION INTERSECTION FOR THE ARTS HAIGHT STREET ART CENTER HAYES VALLEY ART WORK $0 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
